allow: PowerShell(Get-Content "e:\\auction-laravel-application\\public\\build\\manifest.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.PSObject.Properties } | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "Seasons" } | Select-Object Name, @{n='File';e={$_.Value.file}}, @{n='LastModified';e={\(Get-Item "e:\\auction-laravel-application\\public\\build\\$\($_.Value.file\)" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).LastWriteTime}})
